## Checklist

- [ ] I've tested this locally
- [ ] I've updated docs if behavior changed
- [ ] I've added a test if it's non-trivial logic
- [ ] No secrets in the diff (`.env*` is gitignored)
- [ ] Linked the issue this closes (e.g. `Closes #123`)
